allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes returned" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npx vite --port 5173" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\loyal\\tusk" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — OK" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/builder" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Server not responding — restarting"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npx vite --port 5173" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\loyal\\tusk" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/builder" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/form/preview" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — OK" } catch { Write-Output "Restarting..."; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npx vite --port 5173" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\loyal\\tusk" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/form/preview" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\) — OK" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/admin" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — OK" } catch { Write-Output "Restarting..."; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","npx vite --port 5173" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\loyal\\tusk" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/admin" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\) — OK" })
